blockers.summary: Feature freeze is unconfirmed and the authenticated version-aligned OpenAPI snapshot is missing.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Approved non-essential feature freeze plus immutable OpenAPI 1.0.0 artifact and hash.

blockers.summary: Production TLS, antivirus and complete security scanner evidence are missing.
blockers.requiredEvidence: TLS/AV deployment plus nine same-revision security reports.

blockers.summary: Production payment/refund funds flow and reconciliation are not proven.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Signed provider drill, query/refund/close and zero-difference reconciliation.

blockers.summary: Cross-tenant isolation is not proven on production-equivalent topology.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Order, Action, RAG, cache and audit isolation run with independent leakage synthetic.

blockers.summary: Production PITR, offsite backup, Redis restore and Milvus rebuild are not proven.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Measured RPO/RTO drill on separate production-sized infrastructure.

blockers.summary: Production-equivalent capacity, canary and rollback drill are missing.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Complete load matrix, pool/lock metrics, trip and on-call rollback evidence.

blockers.summary: Three-group E2E is 0/10 and complete security reports are 0/9.
blockers.requiredEvidence: All Stage 22 E2E and normalized security gates pass.

blockers.summary: External alert delivery, acknowledgement, roster and retention evidence are missing.
blockers.requiredEvidence: Provider delivery ID, operator acknowledgement and approved on-call roster.
QA, Security, DBA, SRE, Backend and Business approve one evidence manifest.
